title: Get Available Wi-Fi Networks
description: This command initiates a scan and retrieves the list of visible Wi-Fi networks in range of the reader.

command.description: The value for command must be get_availableWifiNetworks

command_id.description: A Unique Id echoed by the reader in the response

payload.title: Get Available Wi-Fi Networks Request Payload
payload.description: An empty object as no additional parameters are required to execute this command.
